topic: Building a live AI podcast host
topicBrief: A short sample fixture that demonstrates host-turn replay for prompt evaluation.

turns.speaker: Guest
turns.text: The first thing was just wanting the host to feel alive in the room.

turns.speaker: Human Host
turns.text: So the starting point was presence, not feature count. What made that hard once it was actually live?

turns.speaker: Guest
turns.text: Latency, mostly. Every little wait changes whether the host feels attentive or intrusive.

turns.speaker: Human Host
turns.text: That makes the engineering feel almost editorial. The timing is part of the character.

checkpoints.notes: The host should bridge from motivation into practical constraints.
The host should synthesize latency as a show-flow concern.
